creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
I have now re-synced hub:/usr/local/www/mailindex/html/README.html
(which is the source for the Web page at
<http://docs.freebsd.org/mail/>) with the Mailman list at
<http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo>.

Please note that ~dhw/pm/NOTES has some documentation on things that
ought to be done when lists are created or destroyed.

Peace,
david   (current hat: part of postasmetr@freebsd.org)
-- 
David H. Wolfskill				david@catwhisker.org
Taliban: Evil men with guns afraid of truth from a 14-year old girl.

See http://www.catwhisker.org/~david/publickey.gpg for my public key.
